name: InspectAgents
description: AI agent testing and safety platform. Search 500+ documented AI chatbot failures, assess deployment risk, get the 63-point testing checklist, and submit incident reports. The most comprehensive AI agent safety resource.

tools.name: search_failures
tools.description: Search and filter the AI failures database (500+ incidents) by category, severity, year, or free text

query.description: Free-text search across title, company, description, impact

tools.name: get_failure
tools.description: Get full details of a single AI failure by ID

tools.name: assess_risk
tools.description: Run the AI risk assessment quiz programmatically and get personalized recommendations

tools.name: get_checklist
tools.description: Retrieve the 63-point AI Agent Risk Checklist, optionally filtered by severity or section

query.description: Free-text search across item names and descriptions

tools.name: submit_feedback
tools.description: Submit feedback, corrections, or new AI incident reports

resources.description: Complete failures database as JSON (500+ incidents)
